title: invoice — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for invoice creation. Off = InvoiceObserver.creating no-ops (returns 503). Emergency-only during DB migrations of the invoices table.
Master toggle for the finalize path. Off = FinalizeInvoiceJob no-ops (invoices pile up in status='draft'). Emergency-only if PDF generation or email delivery is degraded.
Off = GenerateInvoicePDFJob no-ops. Invoices finalize but no PDFs are produced. Used during DomPDF library upgrades.
Off = SendInvoiceEmailJob no-ops. Invoices finalize + PDFs generate but no customer emails go out. Used when notifications module is degraded to avoid backing up its queue.
Off = DispatchDunningRemindersJob no-ops. Past-due invoices remain past-due but no reminder emails fire. Used during dunning-copy A/B tests or when a large email-list bug is being resolved.
Off = InvoiceDueSoonNotification no-ops. Used when the notifications module is throttling.
Off = MarkOverdueInvoicesJob no-ops. Invoices remain 'open' past due_date. Emergency-only — a stuck 'open' invoice past due date is a data-integrity issue.
Off = EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob no-ops. No auto handoff to collections agencies. Used when the third-party agency is having issues or during compliance-review of the handoff process.
Off = ReconcileInvoicePaymentsJob no-ops. Drift with the transactions module goes undetected. Emergency-only — reconciliation is the main integrity check for the finance module.

Off = CreditNoteObserver refuses creates + GenerateCreditNoteJob no-ops. Refund module's IssueCreditNoteOnRefundIssued cascade breaks — refunds will queue up but not produce credit notes. Emergency-only.
Off = FireMarketingCaptureOnInvoicePaid cascade breaks. Paid membership invoices no longer fire marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent. Used when marketing module is degraded.

Off = CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated cascade breaks. New memberships create WITHOUT their invoice — the atomic contract is broken. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — memberships must have invoices per finance policy). Test envs only.
Off = every PDF uses the 'stackra-default' template regardless of entitlement. Used when tenant branding pipeline is degraded to avoid producing malformed PDFs.
Off = S3 uploads without SSE-KMS. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — PDFs contain PII).
Off = PurgeExpiredInvoiceDataJob no-ops. Data accumulates past retention window. Used during compliance review or archive-migration debugging.
